frame_analyses.description: Right needle driver gripping the gauze close to the cutting area.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Grasp is secure with no slip.

frame_analyses.description: Left-hand scissor begins cutting motion from the marked line.
Steady cutting motion following the marked line. Small deviations visible.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Cut direction maintained with minimal deviation.

frame_analyses.description: Transition to counterclockwise cutting around the circle.
Final cut completing the circle, gauze nearly intact on clamps.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: End of cut slightly deviated from original path.

penalties_observed.description: Deviations approximately 3mm at the North point and 2mm at the East point.

penalties.description: Deviations approximately 3mm at the North point and 2mm at the East point.

confidence_rationale: Deviations were moderately visible, gauze remained well-secured overall. Completion time was short.
cannot_determine: Exact millimeter deviation at remaining cardinal points due to oblique view angles.
technique_summary: Execution showed strong control and adherence to the marked line except for slight deviations at a couple of sections.
strengths: Good precision with right-hand instrument control.
improvement_suggestions: Focus on maintaining alignment during transitions around curves.
Minimize deviations at critical points by adjusting grip angle.
